# AFM-0005. Marker-Protected Safe-Write for Generated Files

Date: 2026-04-27
Last-reviewed: 2026-05-01
Tier: B
Status: Deprecated

## Retirement

Superseded-by: none (retired)
Moved-to-stale: 2026-04-28
Reason: The marker-protected write feature was never implemented. The tool evolved as a read-only linter and analyzer without file generation capabilities. README index generation is no longer a planned feature.
